response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned, polyglot engineer with well over 8 years of experience and genuine high-scale distributed-systems exposure (low-latency microservices handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic), plus strong software-craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development). He covers several of the required languages (C/C++, C#, Java, JS/TS). However, the resume shows no direct experience with the core focus of this role: experimentation/feature-flagging platforms, telemetry and metrics infrastructure, or statistical/experimental analysis and bias-detection. His titles (Senior/Staff) and described scope also give little evidence of Principal/IC6-level systemic, cross-team leadership. Worth a screening call to probe experimentation and data depth, but the domain gap against this growth/experimentation mandate is significant.
strengths: 8+ years incl. high-scale, low-latency distributed-systems work
Strong fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev, mentoring
Polyglot covering several required languages (C/C++, C#, Java, JS/TS)
concerns: No demonstrated experimentation or feature-flagging platform experience
Limited evidence of telemetry/metrics and statistical experimental analysis
Scope reads as Senior/Staff, not Principal-level multi-team leadership
